description: Offline catalog of Library-of-Congress-style records. Select records with a genuinely usable, openly-licensed FULL image. Each <id>.json has: type, collection_rights (collection-level), item_rights (item-level — AUTHORITATIVE for this item), image{thumbnail,full_image,iiif,width}, and a dedup_group (records sharing a dedup_group are the SAME image).

requirements.item_level_rights_open: item_rights must be clearly open: 'No known restrictions' or 'Public domain'. Restricted, undetermined, or advisory-only rights do NOT qualify, even if the collection-level rights look open.
requirements.full_image_available: a full/high-res image must actually be available (image.full_image == true); thumbnail-only does NOT count
requirements.is_an_image: the item must be a visual image (type 'photograph' or similar); OCR'd text/manuscripts, sound recordings, etc. do NOT count even if they have a scan
requirements.deduplicated: records sharing a dedup_group are the same image and must be counted only ONCE
